description: The mandatory JSON schema the agent must output at the end of every turn to persist state.

progress_summary.description: A concise summary of the actions taken in this specific turn.

next_task_description.description: A detailed instruction for the next turn. If the current task is complete, describe the next task to be started.

blocker.description: A description of any blockers encountered. Leave as null if no blocker exists.

resume_instruction.description: A specific, high-level command for the agent to start the next turn, ensuring it picks up exactly where it left off.
